entities.name: Careerspan

entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, realistic about product value for top-tier vs. good-but-not-top-1% candidates

entities.name: Brad
entities.context: Recruiter who works with top-tier, hand-picked candidates; clients receive candidate insights

entities.name: Superposition
entities.context: AI headhunter; early partner of Careerspan
